MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-550189, CGC-16-550190 WITH CASE CGC-15-545396
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MAGGIE W. TRINH, ESQ. of Farbstein & Blackman, Tel No. 650-554-6200 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MOTELS-MISSION SERRA, INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASES CGC-16-550189 AND CGC-16-550190 WITH CASE CGC-15-545396 is granted. No opposition filed. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case CGC-15-545396 is designated the lead case and all further filings will be in that case only. Plaintiff shall revise and resubmit its proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
